executives.name: Betsy Atkins
executives.background: Ms. Atkins has served as a director since 2017. She is the CEO of Baja Corp and serves on the boards of Wynn Resorts and SL Green Realty.

executives.name: Thurman Rodgers
executives.background: T.J. Rodgers has served as a director since January 2017. He is the founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation.
